paragraph: Haworth is a single-family market, and right now it's moving with real seller momentum. The median sale price is $1,387,500 on a sale-to-list ratio of 1.007, meaning homes are selling at or slightly above list price. Over half the homes that sold went for more than asking, and the median time on market sits at 13 days. That's a real seller's market, with many multiple offer situations and sellers able to hold firm on price if the home is positioned well. The supply of inventory is sparse, which only strengthens the position of anyone selling. If you're a seller, you have leverage. If you're a buyer, you'll need to move fast on homes that fit, price competitively, and be ready for competition on anything in good condition in the center of the market range.
